creator: dan.kotowski@a9development.com
text:
Created attachment 240459
poudriere bulk -c -j 14amd64 -p latest sysutils/acpica-tools

Possibly similar to 261826 and 263037?

# poudriere bulk -c -j 14amd64 -p latest sysutils/acpica-tools
